chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Suit No. 2115 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES 1. For order on CMA No. 13936/2024 (urgent) 2. For order on CMA No. 13937/2024 (U/O 23 R 1 CPC) 01.10.2024 Mr. Inzimam Sharif Advocate for the Plaintiff.-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency allowed. 2. CMA No. 13937/2024: Learned counsel for the Plaintiff submits that this suit has become infructuous as dispute falls under the ambit of the Trademarks Ordinance, 2001 and they intend to seek their remedy before the Intellectual Property Tribunal as provided under the Intellectual Property of Pakistan Organization Act, 2012 (IPOP Act). He therefore, requests that he be allowed to unconditionally withdraw the suit under Order XXIII Rule 1 CPC. There appears to be no impediment in granting the prayer accordingly this suit is dismissed as withdrawn under order XXIII Rule 1 CPC. JUDGE Amjad PS
